title: Optional chaining should be preferred
description: Optional chaining should be preferredAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoOptional chaining allows to safely access nested properties or methods of an object without having to check for the existence of each intermediate property manually. It provides a concise and safe way to access nested properties or methods without having to write complex and error-pronenull/undefinedchecks.This rule flags logical operations that can be safely replaced with the?.optional chaining operator.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since10.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailab
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Use optional chaining (?.) instead of logical AND checks for property access
Use optional chaining (?.) instead of logical AND checks for array access
